name: Praline Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs, granulated sugar, and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, brown sugar, and flour. Mix on medium speed with an electric mixer until well blended. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in the vanilla; stir in the chopped pecans. Pour over the crust.
3. Bake at 450 degrees F., for 10 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 250 degrees F., and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
4. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, and cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill.
5. Brush with maple syrup; top with pecan halves.
